project_type: Next.js 14 luxury menswear website with App Router
test_framework: N/A for initial build - visual/functional verification via next build
verification_instructions: Run pnpm build to confirm the site compiles without errors. Check that all pages render correctly.
setup_instructions: pnpm install in the project root
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access to npm registry and CDNs. Node.js v22, pnpm 10 available.
contribution_requirements: Greenfield project - no existing contribution guidelines
key_patterns: Next.js 14 App Router, Tailwind CSS for styling, TypeScript throughout, mobile-first responsive design, luxury aesthetic with emerald green (#006B3F), gold (#D4AF37), black (#0A0A0A), cream (#FDF8F0)
directory_structure: Next.js App Router structure: src/app/ for pages, src/components/ for reusable components, src/lib/ for utilities, public/ for static assets
